description: Safe JWT issuance and verification configuration.

verify_claims.rule: Pin to a known issuer URL
Must match this service's audience identifier
Reject if absent or in the past (with no leeway > 60s)
Reject if present and in the future (with no leeway > 60s)
Reject if claim is more than 1 day old when not refreshed
Track for replay prevention on high-value tokens

anti_patterns.rule: Verify with the algorithm matching the issuer's JWKS, not whatever alg the token declares
HMAC keys live in a secret manager, not in source
Always require exp; never issue tokens without expiration
Don't store JWTs in localStorage; use HttpOnly cookies
Always check aud to prevent token confusion across services
